MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WALTER SUSOR'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. Triable issue of facts exists re: Mr. Walden's status as a tenant/subtenant. Order signed. Prevailing party directed to submit a proposed order in compliance with CCP 437c(g). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is continued to January 12, 2026 on the Court's own motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
